DECLARATION OF SVEN PREVRHAL IN SUPPORT OF PLTFS' OPPOSITION TO DEFTS NOTICE & SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PREVRHAL, SVEN PREVRHAL, HEIKE
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-10-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS DAVIS-PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP, MARIA SANTOS, AND RICHARD CURCI'S MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. EVEN ASSUMING DEFENDANT CARRIED ITS INITIAL BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE COMPLAINT IS PREMISED IN PART ON PROTECTED ACTIVITY, PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS GIVEN EVIDENCES THAT COULD DEFEAT THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE AS TO SUCH ACTIVITY AS WELL AS OTHER UNPROTECTED CONDUCT THAT WOULD SUPPORT EACH CLAIM. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEE IS DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS DAVIS - PAUL MANAGEMENT GROUP, MARIA SANTOS AND RICHARD CURCI'S Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint IS DENIED, EVEN ASSUMING DEFENDANT CARRIED ITS INITIAL BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE COMPLAINT IS PREMISED IN PART ON PROTECTED ACTIVITY, PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS GIVEN EVIDENCES THAT COULD DEFEAT THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE AS TO SUCH ACTIVITY AS WELL AS OTHER UNPROTECTED CONDUCT THAT WOULD SUPPORT EACH CLAIM.
